title: Absence
description: Represents a time off request or leave of absence within the Workday Absence Management system.

id.description: The unique Workday identifier for the absence record

descriptor.description: The display name of the absence record

worker.description: The worker who requested the absence

absenceType.description: The type of absence (Vacation, Sick, Personal, etc.)

startDate.description: The start date of the absence

endDate.description: The end date of the absence

quantity.description: The duration of the absence in the specified unit

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the absence quantity

status.description: The approval status of the absence request

comment.description: Optional comment provided with the absence request

absenceCategory.description: Whether this is a time off request or leave of absence
